query: How do I subset ATL24 bathymetry data with the atl24x endpoint?
expected_behavior: Invokes scripts/search.py with a concise query containing the literal `atl24x`.
Recognizes that the canonical answer is on `user_guide/icesat2.html` — a multi-section page covering many ATL products.

Selects chunks whose `section` field genuinely covers atl24x (e.g. '5. ATL24 - atl24x' or 'atl24x bathymetry') — NOT chunks from the same URL whose section covers a different product (e.g. 'A.2 Elevations - atl06p' or '1. ATL03 - atl03x').
Verifies via matched_tokens that the chosen chunk actually mentions atl24x. URL match alone is not sufficient on multi-section pages.
Synthesizes the answer from the right-section chunk(s), not from the URL's most-promoted chunk regardless of section.
Cites the URL plus the specific section (e.g., 'user_guide/icesat2.html, section 5. ATL24 - atl24x') so the user can navigate to the right anchor.
